commit 09494c7d8eb77ccd8838d5d57db16fe30f85f85a
Author: jedarden <Claude Opus 4.6 noreply@anthropic.com>
Date:   Fri Jul 3 20:51:30 2026 -0400

    fix(e2e): allow uptime_seconds to be 0 on fresh server startup
    
    The health status test was failing on fresh server initialization because
    uptime_seconds could be exactly 0 when the server is less than 1 second old.
    
    Changed assertion from toBeGreaterThan(0) to toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(0)
    to handle this timing edge case.
